title: Roasted American Rainbow Trout Grill
description: A savory and light American dish featuring rainbow trout, perfect for a festive occasion, this recipe is kosher-friendly and features a brine-wet preparation method.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Create a brine by mixing kosher salt, brown sugar, black pepper, and garlic powder in a bowl.
Add the rainbow trout fillets to the brine and let them sit for 30 minutes.
Remove the trout from the brine and rinse them under cold water.
Pat the trout dry with paper towels.
Drizzle olive oil over the trout and sprinkle with chopped parsley and dill.
Squeeze lemon juice over the trout.
Place the trout on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the oven for 12 minutes.
Remove the trout from the oven and let them rest for 2 minutes before serving.
